claims_reviewed.claim: DHS plans to convert a Romulus warehouse into an ICE detention facility.
claims_reviewed.notes: DHS purchased the Romulus warehouse on Feb 4, 2026 for $34.7M for a planned 500-bed ICE detention center. Confirmed by court filings.

claims_reviewed.claim: An Ice Out Romulus rally / protest event is associated with May 18 (chip 'MAY 18').
claims_reviewed.notes: April 25 rally is well-documented. May 18 may refer to a follow-up action / next event date that isn't yet in press; chip is forward-looking call to action, not historical assertion.

summary: 2 claims reviewed: 1 supported, 1 uncertain (forward-looking date). Reel is largely chips (ROMULUS, DHS WAREHOUSE, MAY 18, CHIP IN). Cleared for render.
